text:
Is this a simulation of 3 agents producing PRs that 8 humans need to review? :joy:

Just kidding. 

Or not. 

As more and more code can be written in near real time, I think we need to invent more strategy game like environments where you can see workers, artifacts and data moving around. What if each of the rectangles were growing with every item coming in? What if you could go there and control them? What if you could build bridges or block paths? 

<@UC2A2ARPT> For stable counter animations: If the font supports tabular figures, enable: font-feature-settings: “tnum”. Otherwise as you suggested: any monospace font if you want that aesthetic :)

Speaking of aesthetic: did you by any chance look at my friends RYBitten? <https://rybitten.space/|https://rybitten.space/>

attachments.text: RYBitten is a color tool and library for exploring painterly, RYB-inspired color mixing, gamut presets, and palette generation on the web.
attachments.title: RYBitten

As more and more code can be written in near real time, I think we need to invent more strategy game like environments where you can see workers, artifacts and data moving around.
